query: Alley Loop cross country ski race Crested Butte

videos.title: Alley Loop Nordic Ski Races in Crested Butte, Colorado
videos.description: The most unique Nordic marathon and costume party around. The Alley Loop is not your typical Nordic Marathon. It is both a premier American Birkebeiner Qualifying event and Crested Butte’s most outrageous costume party of the year! The course winds through snowy streets, alleyways, and narrow bridges through the heart of downtown Crested Butte. Once you make it through town, you are rewarded with pristine tracks and exhilarating vistas throughout the Crested Butte Nordic trail network.

videos.title: The Alley Loop
videos.description: Colorado's biggest nordic ski race that passes through the streets and alleys of Crested Butte, CO.

videos.title: Alley Loop 2020 Ski Race // Crested Butte, CO
videos.description: The Alley Loop is a 21k and 42k (half and full marathon) Nordic ski race that takes place in Crested Butte, Colorado. Fun for the entire family especially if you’re in costume. It's a truly unique experience to ski through the town. The pub ski the night before might make your race day a wee bit harder.

videos.title: Alley Loop Race Crested Butte Colorado 2020 plus results!! Go Pro POV// Ski Vlog week 4
videos.description:
42k Alley Loop cross country ski race on 2/1/20 in Crested Butte Colorado. Filmed with my go pro I made a race day vlog to film and show some of the fun races that we have here in Colorado and Utah. I hope you enjoy and have a great day!


Race event: https://cbnordic.org/event/the-alley-loop/
Race results for the 42k: https://www.sportstats.us/display-results.xhtml?raceid=108729


This is a very edited down video of the 42k Alley Loop cross country ski race in Crested Butte, Colorado. Thanks for watching!


Thanks for everyone who helped put this race together and I highly recommend it for anyone next year!


Let me know if you have any questions about the race, skis, gear, conditions, etc. in the comments below. Also any feed back on the video would be great!


Sorry for the wind noise, its a first edition GoPro so I tried to hide it with loud songs.


Contact for business inquiries: eriklynchskis@gmail.com


Facebook page: https://www.facebook.com/eriklynchskis/


Music:


intro song:
Ship Wrek & Zookeepers - Ark
[Shipwrek's Social Media]:


https://soundcloud.com/theshipwrek


https://www.facebook.com/theshipwrek


https://www.facebook.com/theshipwrek


https://www.youtube.com/user/theshipwrek




[Zookeepers' Social Media]:


https://soundcloud.com/zookeepersdk


https://www.facebook.com/zookeepers


https://www.instagram.com/zookeepersdk/


Thanks! 


I hope you get some great skiing!!

videos.title: Alley Loop Nordic Marathon in Crested Butte, Colorado
videos.description:
"Part of the American Ski Marathon Series and an American Birkebeiner qualifying race, the Alley Loop is also Crested Butte's largest costume party and biggest Nordic event of the year. The Alley Loop's unique course starts and finishes in the heart of downtown Crested Butte, and in between it meanders through snow-lined alleys, behind false-fronted stores and restaurants, over footbridges and alongside residences. The adult races head out to the expertly groomed Nordic trails on the pristine outskirts of Crested Butte." ~ Crested Butte Nordic Center. 

The Alley Loop Marathon is one of Crested Butte’s best annual parties. This race, put on by the Crested Butte Nordic Center, celebrates our love for Nordic skiing and having a good time. 
https://cbnordic.org

Visit the Crested Butte Nordic Center at https://gunnisoncrestedbutte.com/visit/places-to-go/ski-areas-and-nordic-trails/crested-butte-nordic-center/.

Explore Nordic skiing at https://gunnisoncrestedbutte.com/visit/trip-planning/things-to-do/nordic-skiing/.

Start planning your trip at https://www.gunnisoncrestedbutte.com.

Connect with us!

Subscribe to our channel: 
https://www.youtube.com/GunnisonCrestedButte

Follow us on social media:
Facebook: Gunnison Crested Butte - https://www.facebook.com/GCBTA
Instagram: @gunnisoncrestedbutte - https://www.instagram.com/gunnisoncrestedbutte/
TikTok: @gunnisoncrestedbutte - https://www.tiktok.com/@gunnisoncrestedbutte

Produced by Miller Perspectives

videos.title: Loppet Foundation opens portion of cross-country skiing trails at Theodore Wirth
videos.description:
When it snows in October, many people in Minnesota are craving skiing. 

Marth Bardwell and her daughter Naomi couldn't resist. 

Just this week at Theodore Wirth Park, The Loppet Foundation opened a portion of the cross-country skiing trails. It's the earliest they've ever welcomed skiers and it's likely the first place in the state to make snow this year.

https://www.kare11.com/article/sports/loppet-foundation-opens-portion-of-cross-country-skiing-trails-at-theodore-wirth-park/89-bd2f1df2-a7fb-4122-bdfc-025e145cc830
